content: GitHub Codespaces and Gitpod both provide: browser-accessible cloud dev environments; VS Code or JetBrains Gateway as editors; dev container configuration-as-code (.devcontainer); prebuilt environments to eliminate setup time; port forwarding for running services; integrated terminal access; multi-IDE support. Codespaces adds GitHub ecosystem integration (PRs, Actions). Gitpod adds multi-git-provider support (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket). Both support sharing environments with collaborators. Core UX: instant startup, no local setup, browser or desktop client access.
